bird.name: Atoll fruit dove
bird.summary: The atoll fruit dove (Ptilinopus coralensis) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to the Tuamotu archipelago in Fre…

relations.subject: Atoll fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Atoll fruit dove
relations.evidence: The species is also vulnerable to habitat destruction due to deforestation and the destruction of old, abandoned coconut plantations
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Atoll fruit dove
relations.evidence: The species is rather tame and is rare in inhabited areas making hunting a possible threat
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
